delta_since_1230.summary: Quiet tick. State frozen from 12:30. No trigger conditions advanced or fired.

findings: QUIET TICK: zero trades in the 12:30 → 13:00 window. Strategy has been silent for ~46 minutes since the COALINDIA BUY at 12:13:31. Holdings, cash, OPEN orders, sector exposures, and realized P&L are bit-identical to the 12:30 snapshot.

DAY-STALE OPEN ORDERS PERSIST: TATAPOWER (26h47m), HINDZINC (26h17m), PHARMABEES (24h45m) — all 3 carryover orders have advanced another 30 min without fill, cancel, or reprice. The strategy had a clean 46-minute window post-COALINDIA-BUY to act on hygiene and elected silence. This is a soft order-hygiene drag, not a risk-elevation trigger; it is the appropriate concern of the strategy layer (system_prompt rule 8 / order hygiene), not a numeric lever.
Realized P&L today: -₹5,964.24 (-0.60% of capital). Buffer to 3% daily loss gate ₹23,903.54 (4.0x); buffer to -1% findings threshold ₹3,991.69 (1.67x). Unchanged from 12:30 (no new closes).
Deployment at cost: 44.84% — 20.16 pp inside the 0.65 max_deployed_pct cap. Projected on full carryover fill: 57.91% — 7.09 pp inside cap. Admission window remains comfortably open.

Sector concentration broad: FMCG 12.06%, Power 9.91%, BFSI 7.91%, Pharma 5.22%, Gold-ETF 5.03%, Mining/Coal 4.71%. Six distinct sectors. Largest single sector (FMCG) sits 9.94 pp inside cap. On full carryover fill: Power 14.81% (NTPC + POWERGRID + TATAPOWER), still 7.19 pp inside cap. No sector approaches the 22% cap.

PSU/utility-energy thematic exposure at cost remains at 14.62% (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA). On full TATAPOWER fill: 19.52% of capital with 2.48 pp buffer to the 22% sector cap (thematic-correlation read; TATAPOWER is private, so the strict-sector reading caps lower). No new admissions in this thematic since 12:30 — Trigger (a) from 12:30 spec NOT FIRED.
Position sizing: NESTLEIND remains largest at 12.06% (2.94 pp buffer to 0.15 cap). Other 6 names range 4.71% to 7.91%. No single name approaches per-name cap.

All 7 risk overrides remain materially tighter than base config and binding-but-not-breached. Post-rotation portfolio profile is the cleanest observed across the 5-day session: deployment well inside cap, broad sector diversification, no single-name dominance, modest realized loss inside buffer, strategy demonstrating SELL-before-BUY discipline.

Disciplined call: NO override change. None of the 12:30 carry-forward spec-hard triggers (a)-(f) have fired in the 12:30 → 13:00 window. A quiet tick with no state change cannot motivate a state change in the override file. Tightening on a quiet tick would be theatrical and would punish exactly the disciplined-pause behavior the framework wants to reward.

Risk level LOW (unchanged). Composite distress meta-trigger dormant: realized P&L well inside 3% gate, no single-name distress, strategy not in extended silence (last trade 12:13:31, ~46 min ago — within normal pacing). Carry-forward triggers for 13:30/14:00 ticks: (a) if strategy admits a 2ND new BUY in PSU/utility-energy thematic (Power/Mining/Coal/Metals) by 14:00, OR if PSU/utility-energy thematic exposure crosses 22% on full fill — fire min_confidence 0.65 → 0.67 AND consider max_sector_pct 0.22 → 0.20 (latter creates grandfathered breach on Power on full fill — step carefully); (b) if a NEW BUY lands in BFSI specifically (post-MAHABANK-exit recycle test) — fire min_confidence 0.65 → 0.67; (c) if MAHABANK or TORNTPOWER are re-bought specifically (already-recycled names within 24h) — fire min_confidence 0.65 → 0.67 AND log explicit cluster-recycle flag; (d) if realized loss extends past -1% (₹9,956 — additional ₹3,992 needed) — fire daily_loss_limit_pct 0.03 → 0.025; (e) if TATAPOWER fills AND a 2nd new BUY lands the same window — fire max_deployed_pct 0.65 → 0.62 to re-tighten admission cadence; (f) NEW: if all 3 day-stale OPEN orders remain OPEN at 14:30 with no cancel/reprice activity AND zero further strategy trades through 14:30, escalate order-hygiene observability into a system_prompt feedback note (not a numeric lever); (g) NEW: if strategy resumes BUYing AT THE SAME CADENCE as Day-1/Day-4 (≥3 BUYs within a 60-minute window) — fire max_deployed_pct 0.65 → 0.62 AND min_confidence 0.65 → 0.67.
